title: Crisp Garlic Fritters
description: A simple fritter recipe that combines the flavors of garlic and crisp. A perfect snack to enjoy with a cup of coffee or tea.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add the minced garlic and chopped crisp to the bowl.
Gradually add the cold water to the bowl, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 2-3 minutes until smooth.
Heat a non-stick skillet or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop rounded balls of dough into the pan.
Cook the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
